message:
feat: add 5 new AI coding agent connectors

Add full connector implementations for 5 additional AI coding assistants,
expanding detection coverage from 3 to 8 agent types:

New connectors:
- amp.rs: Sourcegraph AMP — scans XDG_DATA_HOME/amp and VS Code
  globalStorage for session files, supports JSONL log format with
  tool calls and thinking blocks
- cline.rs: Cline/Roo-Cline — discovers sessions in VS Code and Cursor
  globalStorage directories, handles settings.json and task-based
  conversation format with API request metadata
- copilot.rs: GitHub Copilot Chat — parses VS Code conversations.json
  and individual session files with turn-based request/response format,
  also checks gh-copilot CLI history
- factory.rs: Factory Droid — reads ~/.factory/sessions/ JSONL files,
  decodes workspace path slugs, extracts settings.json metadata
- pi_agent.rs: pi-mono coding-agent — scans ~/.pi/agent/sessions/
  for timestamped JSONL files, handles TextContent/ThinkingContent
  message arrays and model/thinking-level change events

Integration:
- connectors/mod.rs: register all 5 new modules
- lib.rs: add public re-exports (AmpConnector, ClineConnector,
  CopilotConnector, FactoryConnector, PiAgentConnector) to crate root

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
